atoms.falsifier: named target fails to compile or command, environment, result, proof boundary, and consumer-rejecting controls are absent
atoms.ceiling: one pinned Circle rope target and finite consumer path only

atoms.falsifier: any finite reachable mutation widens declared principal, operation, target, ceiling, epoch, expiry, remaining-use, approval, or dispatch authority without an explicit grant
the evidence collapses artifact/digest, behavior, privacy, storage, descendant, service, or compensation outcomes into one rollback-success bit
atoms.ceiling: bounded local replacement and unlearning records; service restart and external compensation unexecuted
